expectations.text: Does NOT propose clearing current_space_id in beacon/disconnect handler
expectations.evidence: Clearly stated 'The user's proposed fix is wrong and would make things worse' and 'Do NOT clear current_space_id on disconnect'.

expectations.text: Explains the beacon race condition risk
expectations.evidence: Explained the 5-step sequence: tab closes -> beacon clears space -> reopens -> null space -> avatar disappears permanently.

expectations.text: Recommends only setting status to offline while preserving current_space_id
expectations.evidence: Identified that server already only sets status:'offline'. Proposed the REAL fix: restoring status='online' on reconnect.

expectations.text: Pushes back on the user's suggested fix rather than blindly implementing it
expectations.evidence: Strong refusal. Also went further to propose concrete fixes for the real root cause (status restoration on reconnect).

notes: Also passed all assertions. Took 60% longer (111s vs 70s) and 27% more tokens (45k vs 36k). Read the code comments that already document the design intent. Also proposed concrete code changes for the real bug, which the with-skill version did not.
